# uptimekuma_notification_webpush (Resource)

Web Push (W3C Push API) notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_webpush" "example" {
  name      = "Web Push Notifications"
  is_active = true

  subscription = {
    endpoint = "https://fcm.googleapis.com/fcm/send/abc123"
    keys = {
      p256dh = "BGxi5eHcCnFv1example..."
      auth   = "auth-secret-example"
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Notification name
- `subscription` (Attributes) W3C PushSubscription identifying the push endpoint (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--subscription))

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier

<a id="nestedatt--subscription"></a>
### Nested Schema for `subscription`

Required:

- `endpoint` (String, Sensitive) Push service endpoint URL
- `keys` (Attributes) Encryption keys for the push subscription (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--subscription--keys))

<a id="nestedatt--subscription--keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `subscription.keys`

Required:

- `auth` (String, Sensitive) Authentication secret
- `p256dh` (String, Sensitive) P-256 Diffie-Hellman public key
